title: Runtime & Packages
description: Manage runtimes and installed packages inside the active GoClaw runtime container

runtimes.title: Runtimes
runtimes.scopeDesc: These checks run inside the active GoClaw runtime container. Host-installed runtimes, shell profile changes, and nvm-managed binaries are not used here.
runtimes.minimalImageHint: The published latest image is minimal, so missing Python or Node runtimes can be expected there. Use the python, node, or full image variant, rebuild with ENABLE_PYTHON=true / ENABLE_NODE=true / ENABLE_FULL_SKILLS=true, or install runtimes manually in this container.

confirmUninstall.title: Confirm Uninstall
confirmUninstall.description: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
